2026-03-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, io_buffer_register_bvec(), which allows registering an array of bio vectors (bvecs) to the io_uring resource manager. This is a preparatory step for implementing fuse-over-io-uring zero-copy functionality. The function takes in several parameters, including the bvec array, its length, and flags for issue and release operations. It initializes an io_mapped_ubuf structure and copies the provided bvec array into it. If successful, it returns 0; otherwise, it returns a negative error code.
